info.title: abphelper
info.description: AbpHelper is a tool to help you with developing Abp vNext applications.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

options.name: version
options.description: Show version information

options.name: help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: module
commands.description: Help quickly install/update/uninstall ABP modules. See 'abphelper module --help' for details

options.name: help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: add
commands.description: Add ABP module according to the specified packages

options.name: version
options.description: Specify the version of the package(s) to add

options.name: module-company-name
options.description: The module company name, it will be set to the part before the first "." of the module name if you do not specify.

options.name: shared
options.description: Install the {module-name}.Domain.Shared nuget package

options.name: domain
options.description: Install the {module-name}.Domain nuget package

options.name: entity-framework-core
options.description: Install the {module-name}.EntityFrameworkCore nuget package

options.name: mongo-db
options.description: Install the {module-name}.MongoDB nuget package

options.name: contracts
options.description: Install the {module-name}.Application.Contracts nuget package

options.name: application
options.description: Install the {module-name}.Application nuget package

options.name: http-api
options.description: Install the {module-name}.HttpApi nuget package

options.name: client
options.description: Install the {module-name}.HttpApi.Client nuget package

options.name: web
options.description: Install the {module-name}.Web nuget package

options.name: custom
options.description: Specify which module is added to (or removed from) which app project. e.g. "Web:Web,Orders.Web:Web:Orders" means the Web module and the Orders.Web module were added to (or removed from) the Web app project, the last optional "Orders" is the submodule name used to make up the using namespace.

options.name: directory
options.description: The ABP project root directory. If no directory is specified, current directory is used

options.name: projectName
options.description: The ABP project name. If no name is provided, last part of project file name is used. Example: project file: 'Acme.BookStore.Domain.csproj', the name will be 'BookStore'

options.name: exclude
options.description: Exclude directories when searching files, arguments can contain a combination of valid literal path and wildcard (* and ?) characters. Use double asterisk(**) to search all directories. Example: --exclude *Folder1 Folder2/Folder* **/*Folder? **/*Folder*

commands.name: remove
commands.description: Remove ABP module according to the specified packages

options.description: The module company name, it will be set to the part before the first "." of the module name if you do not specify.

options.name: shared
options.description: Install the {module-name}.Domain.Shared nuget package

options.name: custom
options.description: Specify which module is added to (or removed from) which app project. e.g. "Web:Web,Orders.Web:Web:Orders" means the Web module and the Orders.Web module were added to (or removed from) the Web app project, the last optional "Orders" is the submodule name used to make up the using namespace.

options.name: directory
options.description: The ABP project root directory. If no directory is specified, current directory is used

options.name: projectName
options.description: The ABP project name. If no name is provided, last part of project file name is used. Example: project file: 'Acme.BookStore.Domain.csproj', the name will be 'BookStore'

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Generate files for ABP projects. See 'abphelper generate --help' for details

options.name: help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: crud
commands.description: Generate a set of CRUD related files according to the specified entity

options.name: migration-project-name
skip-permissions
options.description: Skip generating crud permissions

options.name: skip-get-list-input-dto
options.description: skip generate GetListInput Dto files

options.name: separate-dto
options.description: Generate separate Create and Update DTO files

options.name: entity-prefix-dto
options.description: Start DTO name with the entity name. If this option is specified, the dto name would be e.g. 'TodoCreateDto', otherwise it would be 'CreateTodoDto'

options.name: dto-suffix
options.description: Use a customized DTO name suffix instead of 'Dto'

options.name: skip-custom-repository
options.description: Skip generating custom repository interface and class for the entity

options.name: skip-db-migrations
options.description: Skip performing db migration and update

options.name: skip-ui
options.description: Skip generating UI

options.name: skip-view-model
options.description: Skip generating 'CreateUpdateViewModel`, use 'CreateUpdateDto' directly

options.name: skip-localization
options.description: Skip generating localization

options.name: skip-test
options.description: Skip generating test

options.name: skip-entity-constructors
options.description: Skip generating constructors for the entity

options.name: no-overwrite
options.description: Specify not to overwrite existing files or content

options.name: directory
options.description: The ABP project root directory. If no directory is specified, current directory is used

options.name: projectName
options.description: The ABP project name. If no name is provided, last part of project file name is used. Example: project file: 'Acme.BookStore.Domain.csproj', the name will be 'BookStore'

options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: service
commands.description: Generate service interface and class files according to the specified name

options.name: folder
options.description: Specify the folder where the service files are generated. If not specified, the plural form of the service name is used. Multi-level(e.g., foo/bar) directory is supported

commands.name: ef
commands.description: A shortcut to run 'dotnet ef' commands. See 'abphelper ef --help' for details

options.name: help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: add
commands.description:
Adds a new migration. The usage is the same as `dotnet ef migrations add`, 
except providing the default value for the `--project` and `--startup-project` options.

options.name: migration-project-name
directory
options.description: The ABP project root directory. If no directory is specified, current directory is used

options.name: projectName
options.description: The ABP project name. If no name is provided, last part of project file name is used. Example: project file: 'Acme.BookStore.Domain.csproj', the name will be 'BookStore'

options.name: exclude
options.description: Exclude directories when searching files, arguments can contain a combination of valid literal path and wildcard (* and ?) characters. Use double asterisk(**) to search all directories. Example: --exclude *Folder1 Folder2/Folder* **/*Folder? **/*Folder*

options.name: help
options.description: Show help and usage information

arguments.name: ef-options
arguments.description: Other options to `dotnet ef migrations add`

commands.name: remove
commands.description:
Removes the last migration. The usage is the same as `dotnet ef migrations remove`, 
except providing the default value for the `--project` and `--startup-project` options.

options.name: migration-project-name
directory
options.description: The ABP project root directory. If no directory is specified, current directory is used

options.name: projectName
options.description: The ABP project name. If no name is provided, last part of project file name is used. Example: project file: 'Acme.BookStore.Domain.csproj', the name will be 'BookStore'

options.name: exclude
options.description: Exclude directories when searching files, arguments can contain a combination of valid literal path and wildcard (* and ?) characters. Use double asterisk(**) to search all directories. Example: --exclude *Folder1 Folder2/Folder* **/*Folder? **/*Folder*

options.name: help
options.description: Show help and usage information

arguments.name: ef-options
arguments.description: Other options to `dotnet ef migrations remove`
